candidate_archival_state.archival_reason: OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (full ladder passed; breadth solved the s19 OOS-K9 blocker); selection-caveated sample-size demonstration

central_finding.binding_caveat: BUT the 48-name union INCLUDES the known-OOS-CONFIRMED s18 basket, so the OOS-confirmation is partly attributable to SELECTION BIAS. s20 is a SAMPLE-SIZE DEMONSTRATION (breadth fixes the K9 blocker), NOT an independent fresh-generalization confirmation. The cleanest generalization test remains T1 (a never-tested broad universe), which was deferred for zero-fetch speed.
central_finding.headline: s20 PASSES the full ladder (2nd-ever OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC after s18) AND demonstrates that broadening the ranking pool to the 48-name union at fixed M=8 STRUCTURALLY SOLVES the s19 OOS-K9 sample blocker -- confirmed END-TO-END with P&L (s19 was 87 trades/43.6y INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE; s20 is 134/67.2y OOS_CONFIRMED).
central_finding.k9_fix_proven: The breadth-for-turnover mechanism worked exactly as projected: pre-SEAL signal-only measured OOS 134/67.2y; P10 with P&L measured the same 134/67.2y -> the OOS-K9 sample blocker is solved by structure, not by tuning (M=8 unchanged; mechanic byte-identical).
central_finding.oos_economics: OOS net +$60,003.60, expectancy +$353.19/trade, sharpe +0.214, win 55.22%, PF 2.06, maxDD 20.93%, +60.00%; DR1/K9/DR4 all clear.

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED. OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC is a research-phase label, NOT a promotion.
inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, 48-name union) PASSES: IS aggregate 284; OOS 134 (67.2/y) CLEARS the floor; per-fold F1-F5 77/96/81/77/84 (agg 415).

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

FRESH s20 CANDIDATE (NOT a tune/_revN_ of s18 or s19): mechanic byte-identical to the s18/s19 weekly spec; the ONLY change is the universe (48-name union of two pre-committed DR9-passed baskets). s18 (7e6aa36) and s19 (a3aed99) frozen/untouched. M=8 unchanged.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the combined-basket edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s20 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13, and P10 OOS. A null/negative result = accepted, informative (breadth did not yield a surviving edge).

SELECTION-BIAS CAVEAT (BINDING interpretation rule): the 48-name union INCLUDES the known-OOS-CONFIRMED s18 basket, so a positive s20 IS/OOS is WEAK fresh-generalization evidence. s20's honest value is the SAMPLE-SIZE (OOS-K9-reachability-via-breadth) question, NOT independent edge generalization. Read all downstream positive results through this caveat.

PURPOSE = SAMPLE-SIZE FIX: broadening the ranking pool to 48 at fixed M=8 raises boundary churn -> more OOS turnover. Pre-SEAL MEASURED OOS 134 (67.2/y) confirms breadth STRUCTURALLY SOLVES the s19 OOS-K9 blocker (s19 was 43.6/y terminal). Binding confirmation with P&L at P10.
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18/s19.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18/s19; NOT tuned, NOT searched). M held at 8 (NOT scaled to 16) -> breadth effect from universe size alone.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. COUNTER-PRESSURE: more turnover raises cost_drag (~1-3% projected vs <1% parents); DR10-v2 binding at P6.5; REJECT_FAST a more live possibility than the 24-name parents.

split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse the DR9-passed CSVs of BOTH baskets (d86e5d1 + 574fa9e); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; s18 splits (AAPL/NVDA/AMZN/WMT/GOOGL + MRK 1.048) + s19 (NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061) applied+verified.

A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 of 48 -> broad sector spread, more diversified than the 24-name parents); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: byte-locked s18/s19 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning; no held-N change.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

weekly_rs_line_summary.net_read: The weekly RS edge is portable AND its recurring blocker (OOS sample) is solvable by breadth WITHOUT tuning. The cleanest open question -- does the edge survive on a never-tested broad universe (T1) -- remains untested; s20's confirmation is sample-size-driven, not independent-generalization-driven.
weekly_rs_line_summary.s19_independent_24name: edge generalized but INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 at OOS (87/43.6y)
weekly_rs_line_summary.s20_combined_48name: OOS_CONFIRMED_DIAGNOSTIC (134/67.2y) -- breadth solves the K9 blocker; selection-caveated (not clean generalization)

what_s20_demonstrates: OOS-K9 reachability is a function of ranking-pool breadth at fixed held-N: doubling the pool (24->48) lifted OOS turnover from 43.6/y (s19, terminal) to 67.2/y (s20, clears) WITHOUT any parameter/cadence change.
The weekly RS edge survives on the combined basket through IS + cost-stress (S0-S4, DR10 v2 no-fire at 1.03%/y) + 5/5 K13 + a positive OOS (DR4 no-fire).
A disciplined, non-tuning structural fix (breadth) can move a K9-terminal candidate to OOS_CONFIRMED -- the framework permitted it because the fix is mechanic-preserving and was measured pre-SEAL.
what_s20_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate live/paper readiness or money-proven performance.

It does NOT provide CLEAN independent generalization evidence -- the union includes the known-OOS-good s18 basket (selection bias); a positive s20 OOS is weaker generalization evidence than a fresh-universe test would be.
It does NOT warrant promotion/Strategy-Lab/broker/FRC -- all remain permanently blocked.
It does NOT license tuning M/cadence -- M=8 was held fixed by design; the breadth came only from universe size.
